---
title: "appendix"
author: "Vibhor Dabas"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
editor: visual
---

## AI ACKNOWLEDGEMENT

I used chatgpt to -

1.  Fix my grammatical errors and spelling mistakes
2.  To understand summarise function and kable functions to produce table

Here is the link of chatgpt converstaion

<https://chatgpt.com/share/69db6403-c1b8-839a-82a2-8245a7eed365>
